zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret T. Moulton於1469年出生在英國諾福爾可雷普斯 煙雨 巴斯特維其可時，她的父親Richard de Multon29歲，母親Mary Sargent27歲。她於大約1490年與Sir Robert de Marston I, Lord Multon結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1514年12月在英國英格蘭諾福爾可雷普斯享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret T. Moulton于1469年出生在英国諾福爾可雷普斯 煙雨 巴斯特維其可时，她的父亲Richard de Multon29岁，母亲Mary Sargent27岁。她于大约1490年与Sir Robert de Marston I, Lord Multon结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1514年12月在英国英格兰諾福爾可雷普斯享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret T. Moulton was born in 1469, in Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, England, her father, Richard de Multon, was 29 and her mother, Mary Sargent, was 27. She married Sir Robert de Marston I, Lord Multon about 1490. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in December 1514, in Repps, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret T. Moulton est née en 1469, à Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Multon, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mary Sargent, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert de Marston I, Lord Multon environ 1490. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en décembre 1514, à Repps, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret T. Moulton 1469 in Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Multon 29 und ihre Mutter Mary Sargent 27. Sie hat um 1490 Sir Robert de Marston I, Lord Multon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Dezember 1514 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Repps, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret T. Moulton è nata il nel 1469 nel Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Richard de Multon, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Mary Sargent, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert de Marston I, Lord Multon circa 1490. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel dicembre 1514, nel Repps, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret T. Moultonが1469年にイギリスノーフォルクレップス ウィス バストウィックで生まれた時，父Richard de Multonは29歳，母Mary Sargentは27歳であった。約1490年にSir Robert de Marston I, Lord Multonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1514年12月にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクレップスで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret T. Moulton(이)가 1469년 영국 노르폴크 레프스 위스 바스트윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Multon(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Sargent(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1490년 Sir Robert de Marston I, Lord Multon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1514년 12월 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 레프스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret T. Moulton nasceu em 1469, em Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Multon, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mary Sargent, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert de Marston I, Lord Multon aproximadamente 1490. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em dezembro de 1514, em Repps, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret T. Moulton родилась в 1469 г. в местности реппс вит баствикк, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Multon было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Sargent, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert de Marston I, Lord Multon около 1490 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла декабрь 1514 г. в местности реппс, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.
